description: Use this API to write working case GIC Data to text (.gic) file version 4 that has substation data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = gic_write_stn(rfile)

parameters.name: rfile
parameters.description: Gic data file name. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
